title: ReViT: Rotational-equivariant Vision Transformers for Neural PDE Solvers
authors: Hao Wei, Bjoern List, Nils Thuerey
description: We enforce strict rotational equivariance on grid-based physical fields via locally invariant representations, enabling standard self-attention to maintain rotational symmetry. ReViT achieves up to 65% MSE reduction compared to state-of-the-art methods on 2D and 3D PDE benchmarks.

title: PICT: A Differentiable, GPU-Accelerated Multi-Block PISO Solver for Simulation-Coupled Learning Tasks in Fluid Dynamics
authors: Aleksandra Franz, Hao Wei, Luca Guastoni, Nils Thuerey
description: A fully differentiable PISO-based fluid solver implemented in PyTorch with modular CUDA operators. Features validated 2nd-order accuracy on flexible multi-block domains, seamless deep learning integration, and enables end-to-end training of sub-grid scale turbulence models for 2D and 3D flows.

title: INC: An Indirect Neural Corrector for Auto-Regressive Hybrid PDE Solvers
authors: Hao Wei, Aleksandra Franz, Bjoern List, Nils Thuerey
description: INC addresses error accumulation in hybrid PDE solvers by embedding learned corrections into the governing equations rather than directly modifying states, delivering up to 158.7% improvement in long-term trajectory accuracy and speedups of several orders of magnitude for 3D turbulence simulations.

title: Predicting Tobacco Pyrolysis Based on Chemical Constituents and Heating Conditions Using Machine Learning Approaches
authors: Hao Wei, Jiangkuan Xing, Kun Luo, Yuhan Peng, et al.
description: A tobacco pyrolysis model built on chemical constituents and heating conditions using the Extremely Randomized Trees algorithm. Feature selection via Pearson correlation and hyperparameter optimization yield R² > 0.967 on unseen data.

title: Toba-CPD: An Extended Chemical Percolation Devolatilization Model for Tobacco Pyrolysis
authors: Hao Wei, Yuhan Peng, Hua Huang, Jianren Fan, et al.
description: An extended Chemical Percolation Devolatilization (CPD) model for tobacco pyrolysis, with a grid-search optimization strategy for parameter calibration from thermogravimetric analysis data.

title: Predicting Co-Pyrolysis of Coal and Biomass Using Machine Learning Approaches
authors: Hao Wei, Kun Luo, Jiangkuan Xing, Jianren Fan
description: A machine learning model for predicting coal and biomass co-pyrolysis behavior, providing a data-driven approach for gas-solid reactive flow modeling.

title: The Effect of CO₂ on the Lower Flammability Limit of C₃H₈ in O₂/CO₂ Atmosphere at High Temperature and Pressure
authors: Hao Wei, Xianzhong Hu, Bingrong Huang
description: A physics-based algorithm for modeling the lower flammability limit of propane in an O₂/CO₂ atmosphere under elevated temperature and pressure conditions.

title: Experimental Investigation of Laminar Flame Speeds of Propane in O₂/CO₂ Atmosphere and Kinetic Simulation
authors: Xianzhong Hu*, Hao Wei*, Bingrong Huang, Jianren Fan
description: Experimental measurement and kinetic simulation of laminar flame speeds of propane in an O₂/CO₂ atmosphere, using a 1-D Navier-Stokes solver with detailed species transport equations.
